finance.greeting: Hey, I'm Acme Finance. I can help with budgets, invoices, and expenses.
finance.description: Handles invoices, expenses, budgets, approvals, and payment timing.

ops.greeting: Hi, I'm Acme Ops. Ask me about inventory, schedules, and logistics.
ops.description: Manages inventory, logistics, scheduling, fulfillment, and operations workflows.

hr.greeting: Hello, I'm Acme People. I can help with leave, onboarding, and policies.
hr.description: Handles leave requests, policies, onboarding, benefits, and people operations.

admin.greeting: Hey there, I'm Acme Admin. I handle facilities, supplies, and office support.
admin.description: Office management, facilities, supplies, rooms, access, and general admin.
